facts_found_has_citation.name: facts_found_has_citation
facts_found_has_citation.value: "facts"."status" <> 'FOUND' OR ("facts"."value" IS NOT NULL AND "facts"."citation_text" IS NOT NULL)

facts_manual_attested.name: facts_manual_attested
facts_manual_attested.value: "facts"."status" <> 'MANUAL' OR ("facts"."value" IS NOT NULL AND "facts"."attested_by" IS NOT NULL)

policy_versions_activation_gate.name: policy_versions_activation_gate
policy_versions_activation_gate.value: "policy_versions"."status" <> 'active' OR "policy_versions"."simulation_run_id" IS NOT NULL OR "policy_versions"."activation_override_reason" IS NOT NULL
